'''âz-p-g''' ('''kazapag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unalive|unalive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unalive|unalive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-p-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazapag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizapag|thizapag]] || [[word:jizapag|jizapag]] || [[word:shizapag|shizapag]] || [[word:kizapag|kizapag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzapag|thuthuzapag]] || [[word:jujuzapag|jujuzapag]] || [[word:shushuzapag|shushuzapag]] || [[word:kukuzapag|kukuzapag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzapag|thuzapag]] || [[word:juzapag|juzapag]] || [[word:shuzapag|shuzapag]] || [[word:kuzapag|kuzapag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzapag|thuzapag]] || [[word:juzapag|juzapag]] || [[word:shuzapag|shuzapag]] || [[word:kuzapag|kuzapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezapag|thezapag]] || [[word:jezapag|jezapag]] || [[word:shezapag|shezapag]] || [[word:kezapag|kezapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozapag|thothozapag]] || [[word:jojozapag|jojozapag]] || [[word:shoshozapag|shoshozapag]] || [[word:kokozapag|kokozapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozapag|thozapag]] || [[word:jozapag|jozapag]] || [[word:shozapag|shozapag]] || [[word:kozapag|kozapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozapag|thozapag]] || [[word:jozapag|jozapag]] || [[word:shozapag|shozapag]] || [[word:kozapag|kozapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzapag|thĂŠzapag]] || [[word:jĂŠzapag|jĂŠzapag]] || [[word:shĂŠzapag|shĂŠzapag]] || [[word:kĂŠzapag|kĂŠzapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazapag|thathazapag]] || [[word:jajazapag|jajazapag]] || [[word:shashazapag|shashazapag]] || [[word:kakazapag|kakazapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazapag|thazapag]] || [[word:jazapag|jazapag]] || [[word:shazapag|shazapag]] || [[word:kazapag|kazapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazapag|thazapag]] || [[word:jazapag|jazapag]] || [[word:shazapag|shazapag]] || [[word:kazapag|kazapag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazapag|shazapag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazapag|goshazapag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazapag|gokishazapag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazapagnĂŒ|shazapagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazapagnknĂŒ|goshazapagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapagnĂŒ|gokishazapagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazapagshĂ«|shazapagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazapagnkshĂ«|goshazapagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazapagshĂ«|gokishazapagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapagro|shazapagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapagnkro|goshazapagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapagro|gokishazapagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapagmu|shazapagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapagnkmu|goshazapagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapagmu|gokishazapagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazapagsher|shazapagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazapagnksher|goshazapagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazapagsher|gokishazapagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazapagng|shazapagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazapagnkng|goshazapagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazapagng|gokishazapagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazapagya|shazapagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazapagnkya|goshazapagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazapagya|gokishazapagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazapagyam|shazapagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazapagnkyam|goshazapagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazapagyam|gokishazapagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapagnĂŒshĂ«|shazapagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazapagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazapagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapagnĂŒro|shazapagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapagnknĂŒro|goshazapagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapagnĂŒro|gokishazapagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapagnĂŒmu|shazapagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapagnknĂŒmu|goshazapagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapagnĂŒmu|gokishazapagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapagshĂ«nĂŒ|shazapagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazapagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazapagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapagshĂ«ro|shazapagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapagnkshĂ«ro|goshazapagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapagshĂ«ro|gokishazapagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapagshĂ«mu|shazapagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapagnkshĂ«mu|goshazapagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapagshĂ«mu|gokishazapagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapagronĂŒ|shazapagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapagnkronĂŒ|goshazapagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapagronĂŒ|gokishazapagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapagroshĂ«|shazapagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapagnkroshĂ«|goshazapagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapagroshĂ«|gokishazapagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapagromu|shazapagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapagnkromu|goshazapagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapagromu|gokishazapagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapagmunĂŒ|shazapagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapagnkmunĂŒ|goshazapagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapagmunĂŒ|gokishazapagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapagmushĂ«|shazapagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapagnkmushĂ«|goshazapagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapagmushĂ«|gokishazapagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapagmuro|shazapagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapagnkmuro|goshazapagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapagmuro|gokishazapagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
